brief.targetAudience: People who want to switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: The superlative headline format combined with a clean clinical studio shot and social proof rating positions Organica Tulsi Green Tea as the definitive upgrade for coffee switchers.
copyOptions.visual_description: A single standup pouch bag of Organica Tulsi Green Tea is centered in frame against a soft gradient background transitioning from muted sage green at the top to near-white cream at the bottom. Lighting is soft and diffused with a gentle drop shadow beneath the product, giving it a clean floating-on-surface feel. The product is photographed at a very slight 3/4 angle, essentially front-facing, with a flat depth of field and everything sharp — no bokeh, no props, purely the hero product.
headlines: The World's Most Soothing Green Tea
subheadlines: Pure Tulsi Green Tea — no jitters, no crash, no regrets.
Real Tulsi, real calm — no artificial flavours, no caffeine crash, no guilt.
Organica Tulsi Green Tea: no bitterness, no additives, no looking back.
